passive.name: Backstab
passive.description: Shaco's basic attacks and Two-Shiv Poison deal additional damage when striking from behind.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Shaco}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} when hitting an enemy from behind.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''{{ai|Deceive|Shaco}}'' and ''{{ai|Two-Shiv Poison|Shaco}}'' have additional effects when they hit an enemy from behind.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Shaco's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to deal {{as|{{pp|20 to 35}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 25% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} when hitting an enemy from behind. ''Backstab'' is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.description2: ''{{ai|Deceive|Shaco}}'' and ''{{ai|Two-Shiv Poison|Shaco}}'' have additional effects when they hit an enemy from behind.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Backstab's'' bonus damage adds to the damage instance of the original basic attack.
* The attacks do not deal the '''bonus''' damage against [[structures]].

Q.name: Deceive
Q.description:
Shaco becomes Invisible and teleports to target location.

His first attack while Invisible is empowered, dealing bonus damage and critically striking if he attacks from behind.
Q.tooltip:
Shaco teleports and becomes Invisible for {{ stealthduration }} seconds. Using Jack In The Box or Hallucinate does not break Invisibility.

Shaco's next Attack while Invisible deals an additional {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. If striking from behind, this Attack critically strikes for {{ qcritdamagemod }} damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Shaco}} becomes {{tip|invisible}} for a short time and {{tip|blinks}} to the target location.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After breaking the invisibility, his next basic attack within a brief moment will deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|{{ai|Backstab|Shaco}} Bonus:}} The attack will {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Shaco''' becomes {{tip|invisible}} for a duration, and after a {{fd|0.125}}-second delay, he {{tip|blinks}} to the target location.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Deceive's'' {{tip|invisibility}} breaks when '''Shaco''' uses a basic attack or casts ''{{ai|Two-Shiv Poison|Shaco}}'', but not from casting ''{{ai|Jack in the Box|Shaco}}'' or ''{{ai|Hallucinate|Shaco}}''.
wiki_detail.description3: After breaking the invisibility, '''Shaco''' empowers his next basic attack within {{fd|0.25}} seconds to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, which is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|{{ai|Backstab|Shaco}} Bonus:}} The attack will {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|55|100}} '''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description5: ''Deceive will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Deceive's'' bonus damage adds directly to the damage instance of the basic attack.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the end of the attack windup.

W.name: Jack In The Box
W.description: Shaco creates a hidden animated Jack-in-the-Box. When triggered, it will fear and attack nearby enemies.

E.name: Two-Shiv Poison
E.description: Shaco's Shivs passively poison targets on hit, slowing their Move Speed. He can throw his Shivs to deal damage and poison the target. The thrown Shiv deals bonus damage if the target is below 30% health.
E.tooltip:
Passive: While this Ability is off Cooldown, Shaco's Attacks Slow the target by {{ slowamount*-100 }}% for {{ slowdurationpassive }} seconds.

Active: Shaco throws a shiv, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slowing by {{ slowamount*-100 }}% for {{ slowdurationactive }} seconds. If the target has less than {{ executehealththreshold*100 }}% Health, the shiv deals {{ totalexecutedamage }} damage instead.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} While ''Two-Shiv Poison'' is not on cooldown, {{cis|Shaco}} basic attacks will {{tip|slow}} enemies for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Shaco''' throws a dagger at the target enemy that {{tip|slows}} them for a short time, dealing {{as|magic damage}} that is increased if they are {{as|at low health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|{{ai|Backstab|Shaco}} Bonus:}} The dagger deals additional {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Shaco's''' basic attacks {{tip|slow}} enemies for 2 seconds while ''Two-Shiv Poison'' is not on cooldown.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Shaco''' throws a dagger at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}}, {{ccs|increased by 50%|magic}} if they are {{as|'''below''' 30% of their '''maximum''' health}}, and {{tip|slows}} them for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|{{ai|Backstab|Shaco}} Bonus:}} The dagger deals an additional {{as|{{pp|15 to 50}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, increased to {{as|{{pp|15*1.5 to 50*1.5}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ {{ap|10*1.5}}% AP)}} if the target is {{as|'''below''' 30% of their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Shaco''' replicates the last attack animation he performed for ''Two-Shiv Poison's'' animation.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Hallucinate
R.description: Shaco creates an illusion of himself near him, which can attack nearby enemies (Deals reduced damage to turrets).  Upon death, it explodes, spawning three mini Jack in the Boxes and dealing damage to nearby enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Shaco}} briefly {{tip|vanishes}} and {{tip|blinks}} in the target direction, creating a {{tip|clone}} of himself for some time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The clone will explode upon dying or expiring, which deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and deploys three {{ai|Jack in the Box|Shaco|mini-boxes}} that activate instantly, briefly {{tip|fearing}} nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Shaco''' commands the clone to move to the target location.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Shaco''' {{tip|vanish|vanishes}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds and {{tip|blinks}} in the {{tt|target direction|150 units}} while creating a {{tip|clone}} of himself that is summoned in the {{tt|opposite direction|150 units}}, remaining within {{tt|control range|1125 units}} of him as a controllable {{tip|clone}} for up to 18 seconds.

''Hallucinate'' can be recast at any time while the clone is alive, and can be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Shaco''' commands the {{tip|clone}} to move to the target location.
wiki_detail.description3: The clone will explode upon dying or expiring to deal {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and deploy three ''{{ai|Jack in the Box|Shaco|mini-boxes}}'' that activate instantly, {{tip|fearing}} nearby enemies for {{fd|1.25}} seconds, increased to {{fd|2.2}} seconds against non-champions, and {{tip|root|rooting}} them for {{fd|0.5}} seconds, increased to {{tt|{{fd|0.6}} seconds|Estimated}} against monsters and {{tt|1 second|Estimated}} against minions. After a {{fd|0.15}}-second delay of the ''boxes' '' activation, enemies hit also have their {{as|movement speed}} reduced. Enemy champions have their {{as|movement speed}} set to a {{as|static 100|ms}}, while non-champions are set to a {{as|static 60|ms}}. The {{as|movement speed}} reduction lasts for{{ft|the same duration as the fear plus {{fd|0.25}} seconds.|{{fd|1.25}} seconds against champions, {{fd|2.25}} seconds against minions, and {{fd|2.5}} seconds against monsters.}}
wiki_detail.description4: The ''boxes'' possess ''{{ais|Jack in the Box|Shaco}}'' effects, except they have a doubled, but shared {{sti|{{as|health}}}}, and deal {{as|'''modified''' magic damage}} with each attack, increased when attacking a single unit.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Modified Magic Damage|{{ap|10 to 30}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}}|Increased Modified Damage|{{ap|25 to 75}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The root and fear are applied at the same time. The target cannot be forced to move by the fear during the root.
** The target is however allowed to move despite being rooted for the first {{fd|0.15}} seconds of the root. They can be forced to move by the fear during this time.
* '''Shaco''' and the ''Hallucination'' will face each other the moment of their appearance.
* The explosion and the ''boxes'' apply {{tip|area damage}}, while the clone deals {{tip|pet damage}}.
* ''Hallucinate'' will cast from wherever '''Shaco''' is at the end of the cast time.
* When '''Shaco''' dies, the clone will automatically target the closet visible enemy champion within 1500 units.
* The clone will always spawn in the opposite direction of the cursor.
** If ''Deceive'' and ''Hallucinate'' are used in quick succession, the clone will spawn in the direction of the cursor instead.
